title: Energy Facilities Attacked in Iran and Qatar, Sending Prices Soaring
summary_full: The strikes on a gas field in Iran and an industrial complex in Qatar appeared to be some of the most significant attacks on energy sites since the U.S.-Israeli air war against Iran began.
summary_public: The strikes on a gas field in Iran and an industrial complex in Qatar appeared to be some of the most significant attacks on energy sites since the U.S.-Israeli air war against Iran began.

IL.label: neutral
IL.evidence: U.S.-Israeli air war against Iran began
